content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift filters users by star rating before routing to a direct `itms-apps://…write-review` URL (only ≥4-star users reach the App Store; others are diverted to feedback@fitpulse), and description.txt explicitly asks "rate us 5 stars!", bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans gating users to the review prompt based on their rating and using direct write-review links instead of the system API — this is a textbook 5.6.1/5.6.3 dark pattern and a common rejection reason. Replace the custom star gate and direct URL with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` (or the SwiftUI `.requestReview` environment action) shown unconditionally to all users, and drop "rate us 5 stars" language from the metadata.
